name: Draft Day Sports: Pro Basketball 2025
short_description: Draft Day Sports: Pro Basketball 2025 puts you in the role of general manager of your favorite basketball team. Every decision can be made by you from drafting, trading, signing free agents all the way to making each substitution to lead your team to championship glory and becoming a dynasty.
detailed_description:
Draft Day Sports: Pro Basketball 2025 gives you the ultimate franchise mode basketball experience. Take control as general manager of your favorite team and get ready to experience basketball simulation nirvana!

As general manager it is up to you to draft, trade, sign free agents and make the roster decisions that will lead your team to be basketball's next great dynasty. Every choice matters in roster construction as each player is built with unique skills, playing styles and attitudes leaving you with the challenge of crafting a team that works well together.

Enjoy the immersive and deep game world - participate in press conferences, check out the almanac full of career stats and data and experience in-game presentations of the draft lottery, the in-season tournament pool drawing and the best in-game draft of any sports game on the market.

Are you ready for the ultimate basketball challenge? Get ready to step into the front office and to build your dynasty!
